text: I feel curiously stimulated and rather contemplative. The play of neon light, the clean glass, and the bold graphics evoke a sense of modernity and experimentation. Surrounded by words about confusion and meaning, I experience a subtle unease and thrill at being swept into a space where the boundaries of understanding are meant to blur. I feel as if I am not only an observer, but also a subject within an ongoing philosophical experiment—my actions and perceptions now part of the data collected here.
